what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment ledger entry that records an image attachment (id att-9b24393d) for the design-assets channel, pointing to an image asset via an image:// URI and recording when it was added.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
No body content after the frontmatter
standouts: Attachment target URI contains spaces and parentheses: 'image (12)'
Minimal metadata-only record with no descriptive text or alt text
Timestamped ledger entry linking a channel to a specific image asset
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
References an asset with an image:// URI scheme
concerns: Target URI contains unescaped spaces and parentheses, which may be fragile for parsers or path resolution
No file extension or MIME type for the referenced image
No title, caption, or alt text describing the attachment
No indication of who added the attachment or why
notes: A bare metadata stub that ties an infographic image asset to the design-assets channel.
questions: Is 'image (12)' the literal filename or a placeholder generated by an export?
What is the actual file format/extension of the referenced image?
Who added this attachment and what is its intended use?
Is there a corresponding asset file stored at the image:// URI?
purpose_vs_actual: The file's purpose is to record an image attachment for a channel, and that is exactly what its metadata does.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, timestamped link between the design-assets channel and a specific infographic image so the attachment can be discovered and referenced later.
novelty: The target URI embeds a space and parentheses in the asset name, which is uncommon for clean URI references, and the file contains no content beyond frontmatter.
contribution: It contributes a typed, timestamped channel-to-asset reference that a fused system could use to locate and associate an infographic image with the design-assets channel.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record named att-9b24393d in the design-assets channel that references the image asset 'image://design-assets/infographs/image (12)' and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog an image attachment linking a specific infographic asset to the design-assets channel.
